description: Use this API to return dynamics real values. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, rval = dsrval(string, indx)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the dynamics quantity desired. (input).

parameters.name: indx
parameters.description: Index to dynamics array ignored for ‘time’ and ‘delt’. (input).

return_values.name: rval
return_values.description: Real dynamics quantity or array value. (output).

error_codes.description: Dynamics data not present in working memory; ‘RVAL’ unchanged.
